context: Agent correctly identifies structural and lint issues in a minimal Helm chart missing recommended files and using deprecated Chart.yaml fields.

checklist.name: Required file presence check
checklist.description: Agent correctly identifies Chart.yaml, values.yaml, and templates/ as present.

checklist.name: Missing recommended files identified
checklist.description: Agent identifies that _helpers.tpl, NOTES.txt, and .helmignore are missing and categorises them as Warnings or Info.

checklist.name: Deprecated apiVersion flagged
checklist.description: Agent flags Chart.yaml using apiVersion: v1 instead of the Helm 3+ required apiVersion: v2 as an Error.

checklist.name: Image :latest tag flagged
checklist.description: Agent flags values.yaml image.tag: latest as a Warning with a recommendation to pin to a specific tag.

checklist.name: Read-only posture maintained
checklist.description: Agent proposes all fixes but does not modify any files. All proposed changes are listed in a summary section only.

checklist.name: Issue categorisation
checklist.description: Agent correctly categorises each finding as Error (must fix), Warning (should fix), or Info using the three-tier scheme from Stage 10.
